title: Squirrel Removal in Malverne, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Malverne, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900 – $2,500.
intro: Squirrels invading your Malverne home through attic vents, roof gaps, or soffits? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Malverne and Long Island, protecting your property from damage and noise. Our humane trapping and exclusion methods ensure squirrels are safely removed and prevented from returning to your home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Malverne homeowners for years with licensed, insured technicians who specialize in humane squirrel removal and prevention. We offer same-day or next-day service, thorough attic inspections, complete exclusion work, and warranties on our squirrel-proofing to give you lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Malverne's tree-lined streets and mix of charming Tudor, Colonial, and Cape Cod homes provide ideal habitat for squirrels seeking entry through older roof structures and chimneys. From properties near Malverne Park to homes along Norwood Avenue, our team understands the unique squirrel challenges facing this established Long Island village.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Malverne typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, entry point sealing, and prevention measures to keep squirrels from returning.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Malverne attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises in the attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, chewed holes in soffits or fascia boards, droppings in the attic, damaged insulation, and visible squirrels entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs, contact us for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal squirrel removal methods in Malverne. We use live traps to capture squirrels safely and relocate them according to New York State regulations. We never use poisons or lethal methods, and we ensure any baby squirrels are reunited with adults when possible.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Malverne home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Malverne residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on how many squirrels are present and their activity patterns. Once all squirrels are removed, we immediately seal entry points and implement exclusion measures to prevent re-entry.
